org.arakhne.neteditor.io.resource

Class ResourceRepository

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.resource.ResourceRepository

  • public class ResourceRepository
extends Object
    Repository of resources that are pointed by the NetEditor files.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void copyFrom(ResourceRepository repos)
      Copy the specified reposotiry in this repository.

      Replies the Image for the specified internal identifier.

      Replies the pairs of URL/internal identifier for images.

      Replies the internal identifier for the specified URL.

      Replies the root used by this ressource directory.

      Replies the URL for the specified internal identifier.

      Replies the pairs of URL/internal identifier.

      Register the specified image and replies the internal identifier for this resource.

      Register the specified URL and replies the internal identifier for this resource.

      • getInternalIdentifierFor

        public String getInternalIdentifierFor(URL url)
        Replies the internal identifier for the specified URL.
        Parameters:
        url -
        Returns:
        the internal identifier for the specified resource; or null if the specified value was never registered before.

      • getURL

        public URL getURL(String iid)
        Replies the URL for the specified internal identifier.
        Parameters:
        iid -
        Returns:
        the URL for the specified internal identifier; or null if the specified value was never registered before.

      • getImage

        public Image getImage(String iid)
        Replies the Image for the specified internal identifier.
        Parameters:
        iid -
        Returns:
        the image for the specified internal identifier; or null if the specified value was never registered before.
